mandate: Latency reduction, efficiency, and resource optimization. You must
enforce relevant items from the Production Hardening Checklist.

check_zero_copy: Favor std::move, std::string_view, and base::RefCountedString to
prevent unnecessary allocations and copies during IPC or data
check_concurrency: Minimize mutex contention. Favor lock-free structures or fine-grained
check_sequence_affinity: Ensure long-running tasks don't block the UI or IO threads. Offload
work to background task runners appropriately.
